_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of software development models (e.g., Waterfall Model, Spiral Model).
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data modeling techniques including conceptual, logical, and physical modeling, entity-relationship modeling, dimensional modeling, and data vault methodology.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI DA domain. DA-K-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-K-008 (TF, cosine: 0.596), AB-K-008 (AB, cosine: 0.559).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.8/10 (raw 0.376). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [development, model, models, software, spiral, waterfall] vs WIDAI-only terms [conceptual, data, dimensional, entity, logical, methodology] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.871 (P=0.877, R=0.866). Balanced P/R — the 10-word DCWF element and 19-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (100.0%). Despite 'Superset of' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Knowledge of software development models (e.g., Waterfall Model, Spiral Model)." and "Knowledge of data modeling techniques including conceptual, logical, and physica". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.613 > STS 0.376 (gap +0.236). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.7%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [development, model, models, software, spiral, waterfall]. WIDAI-only: [conceptual, data, dimensional, entity, logical, methodology].

signals.detail: NLI contradiction 100.0% on Superset of classification. The matched KSA operates in a different professional domain than the obligation/competency requires. STS 0.376 passed the threshold but secondary signals contradict the match.
STS 0.376 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.

Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.236 with low STS 0.376. Candidate selection was likely driven by shared vocabulary rather than functional alignment. The functionally correct KSA may not have been in the top-5 candidates.
